archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) with Apple-level Premium Glassmorphism twist
design_philosophy: Authoritative, cutting-edge, transparent, premium. Focus on stark contrasts, crystal glassmorphism for floating elements, and a cinematic tech aesthetic. Avoid typical SaaS templates; use tension, generous spacing, and deep optical clarity.

glassmorphism.description: Apple-level crystal clarity used for Navbars, Floating Chatbots, and Modal overlays.
glassmorphism.classes: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/5 dark:bg-black/40 border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]

neumorphism.description: Tactile buttons and widget cards. Used sparingly.

tracing_beam_card.description: Service cards featuring a glowing gradient border effect on hover.
tracing_beam_card.classes: relative overflow-hidden group border border-white/10 bg-black/50 hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors duration-500

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism header. Must contain Logo, 3-5 links, Theme Toggle, and primary CTA. Mobile must use a sleek slide-out menu.

hero.layout: Centered or asymmetric split. Must use hero_mesh_bg as a background layer with a dark overlay (bg-black/40) for text legibility.
hero.elements: H1, Overline, subheadline, Primary CTA (Glow), Secondary CTA (Outline).

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-black font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

service_cards.layout: Grid Bento layout. Cards must have hover state lifting slightly (-translate-y-1) and exposing a subtle inner glow.

dashboard_cards.style: Control Room layout. Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds shadow-lg and border darkens.

floating_chatbot.style: Bottom-right fixed position. Glassmorphism orb with pulse animation. Expands into a crystal-clear chat window on click.

animations.scroll_reveal: Elements fade in and translate y up by 20px when in view.
animations.hover_states: Buttons and links must have explicit hover colors. Service cards must have a 0.5s ease-out transition on hover.
animations.particles: Use @tsparticles/react for a subtle network mesh in the hero section.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D network mesh background. Use in Hero section.
hero_background.usage: Cover image with black/40 to black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

glassmorphism_texture.usage: Background for About or Contact sections.

client_logos_bg.usage: Use as a placeholder or background in the trusted by/logos section.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 text contrast. Use text shadows if text is placed over images.
accessibility_and_testing.hover_focus: Explicit hover and focus states must be defined for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind with the color palette provided. Configure Dark mode.
2. Implement a global Layout with a glassmorphism sticky header and a massive dark footer.
3. Build the Home page with tsparticles in the hero section overlaying the hero_background image.
4. Build the Services page using the Tracing Beam card style and Grid Bento layout.
5. Build the About and Contact pages using the provided Unsplash and generated images.
6. Build the Dashboards (Client & Admin) using a denser 'Control Room' grid layout, avoiding heavily styled components in favor of clean, stark lines (1px borders, solid backgrounds).
7. Implement the floating AI chatbot using framer-motion for pulse animations and state toggling.
8. Ensure every form input uses Shadcn components customized to match the high-end dark theme.
9. Inject data-testid into all interactive components.
